model_winners: object keyed by DEPRESSION, DIABETES; each value enum: static_wins, dynamic_wins

DEPRESSION.top_residual_outlier_fips: array of five 5-digit FIPS strings in residual order
DEPRESSION.unemployment_change_tercile_means: object with numeric keys T1, T2, T3 rounded to 2 decimals

DIABETES.top_residual_outlier_fips: array of five 5-digit FIPS strings in residual order
DIABETES.unemployment_change_tercile_means: object with numeric keys T1, T2, T3 rounded to 2 decimals

scope.exclusions_by_reason: object with integer keys invalid_fips, outside_requested_states, missing_ses, missing_health_data
scope.requested_states: array of state abbreviations in prompt order

warehouse.measure_ids: array containing exactly these requested measure ids: DIABETES, DEPRESSION
